rulings.Case Title: SHERMAN FONG VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS B*P AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 20, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation¿s motion for summary judgment is continued on the court¿s own motion to April 27, 2011 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 220. The court understands that the trial date is April 25, but April 27 is the earliest possible date the court can hear this motion. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: KAARI MARTIN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al*****TRANSFERRED TO BUTTE COUNTY*****
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Order To Realign Deft-Heir As Pltf
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 20, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to realign defendant-heir as plaintiff is granted. No opposition filed. If any party wants a hearing, that party must notify the court by emailing contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30 pm on April 19. If a hearing is requested, it will be on April 26, 2011 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 220. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: LARRY SCHULER VS. C.C. MOORE & CO. ENGINEERS et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY*****
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 20, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Tosco Corporation¿s motion for change of venue to Los Angeles County is granted pursuant to plaintiff¿s statement that it does not oppose a change of venue to Los Angeles. If any party wants a hearing, that party must notify the court by emailing contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm on April 19. If a hearing is requested, it will be on April 26, 2011 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 220. = (220/HEK)
